posts.author: AkuHyrskykari (Hyrskykari Aku)
posts.cookedHtml:
Description

Updating the description of an automation cancels out all the changes you’ve made so far.

What are you trying to achieve

When making changes to an automation its natural to also update the description at the same time. Unfortunately updating the descreption cancels all the changes you’ve made… Can I get a fix for this or at least a popup notification warning me that unsaved changes will dissappear if description is changed. Not a big problem and easily avoided but i keep falling for it. Could you please fix this…
